name: One Bowl Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeIngredient: 2 pkg BAKER'S Semi-Sweet Chocolate (8 squares each)
recipeInstructions:
1. MICROWAVE chocolate and milk in a large microwavable bowl on HIGH for 2-3 minutes, or until the chocolate is almost melted. Stir halfway through the heating time.
2. Continue stirring until the chocolate is completely melted.
3. STIR in vanilla.
4. Spread the mixture into an foil-lined 8-inch square pan.
5. Drop peanut butter by teaspoonfuls on top of the fudge.
6. Swirl with a knife to marbleize.
7. REFRIGERATE for 2 hours or until firm.
8. Cut into squares.
